name: What's my occupational illness case worth if I can't work anymore from asbestosis?
description: Lost wages + medical + disability pay; totals $100k+ for total disability[4].

mainEntity.name: What's my occupational illness case worth if I can't work anymore from asbestosis?

acceptedAnswer.text: Lost wages + medical + disability pay; totals $100k+ for total disability[4].
acceptedAnswer.description:
Depends on wages, disability degree, medical costs; permanent total can be 6x average wages or lifetime benefits.

Idaho/Utah award TTD, PPD, medical, sometimes death benefits[1][4].

- Calculate lost wages x duration.
- Factor impairment rating.
- Settlements average $50k-$200k+.

Attorney evaluates for max value; free consults common.
